steps.title: Supply the main verb
steps.content: The sentence has the subject the word pessimism and needs a finite main verb. The phrase in a 1794 letter points to a completed event in the past.

steps.title: Use simple past tense
steps.content: A is an infinitive, C is a participle, and D is a perfect participial phrase; none can serve as the sentence's main verb. The simple past verb completes the clause. The answer is B.
